non_compliance_flags.message: Parallel cables required at TX-1 secondary: single 630 mm² Cu XLPE method F insufficient for 1600 A In (Iz ≈ 1090 A); 2 × 500 mm² parallel run accepted per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 §523.6 (equal length, same csa / material / insulation / installation method, terminated on common busbars). Iz_corrected = 2 × 915 ≈ 1830 A.

Cumulative-Vd binding on L3 riser tap-off: 50 mm² rejected (cumulative 1.7% leaves insufficient headroom for the 38 m L3.C04 final downstream); 70 mm² accepted at 1.5% cumulative to keep L3.C04 at ≤ 4.5%. Engineering judgement allocates the cascade Vd budget per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex G.

Cumulative-Vd binding on long L3 final circuit (38 m): 2.5 mm² rejected (cumulative 6.6% > 5%); 4 mm² accepted at 4.5% cumulative, within the 5% power-circuit limit per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex G. Engineer-confirmed acceptable; runtime calc.voltage_drop deferred per WI3.

Harmonic derating applied on L3 server rack IT load: 30% h3 triplen content invokes Annex E (Ch = 0.86 per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex E Table E.1). 4 mm² rejected (Iz_corrected 30.1 A insufficient with Ch applied); 6 mm² accepted (Iz_corrected 41 A ≥ 32 A In). Neutral upsized to full phase csa (6 mm²) per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 §523.6.3 because h3 content ≥ 15% drives neutral current toward 1.73× phase current.

assumptions: INT 400V TPN+E TN-S supply per IEC 60364-4-41:2017 §411 fault-protection by ADS; engineer-declared PSCC = 25 kA at TX-1 secondary verified at incoming busbar.

Parallel cables at TX-1 sized per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 §523.6: 2 × 500 mm² Cu XLPE method F, equal length 8 m, same csa / insulation / installation, terminated at MSB-1 common busbar; mutual impedance neglected per §523.6 second paragraph.

Cumulative voltage drop budget allocated across the cascade per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex G (lighting 3% / power 5%): RISER.L3 walked up to 70 mm² at design time to preserve 3.0% segment headroom for the 38 m RISER.L3.C04 final downstream.

Harmonic derating on L3.C07 IT load per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex E Table E.1: 30% h3 triplen content gives Ch = 0.86 (interpolated 15-33% band); neutral upsized to full phase csa per §523.6.3 because h3 ≥ 15%.

CPC sized per IEC 60364-5-54:2011 §543: phase ≤ 16 mm² → CPC = phase by Table 54.2 conservative default (RISER.L3.C04 4/2.5 reduced per Table 54.2 column for steel armour acting as CPC; RISER.L3.C07 6/6 full); reduced CPC for ≥ 25 mm² phase verified by adiabatic equation S² ≥ I²t / k² (k = 143 for Cu/XLPE).

Engineer's design intent: XLPE for all feeders (TX-1, F-RISER, L1, L2, L3) and IT-load final (L3.C07) for thermal margin and harmonic tolerance; PVC singles for the long socket-outlet final (L3.C04) per commercial fit-out practice.
Parent-node Ifault attenuation along cascade modelled as engineer estimates (TX-1 25 kA → L3 14 kA → L3.C04 8 kA / L3.C07 8.5 kA); calc.fault_level deferred per WI3.

calc.cable_ampacity / calc.voltage_drop / calc.cpc_adiabatic deferred per WI3 — engineer estimates from IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex B (correction factors) + Annex G (Vd limits) + Annex E (harmonics) serve as placeholders pending deterministic resolution.

rationale.chat_summary: INT 400V TPN+E commercial 3-storey building per IEC 60364-4-41:2017. 7-node cascade: TX-1 2 × 500 mm² Cu XLPE parallel (parallel_required per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 §523.6); MSB→riser 185 mm² (iz_vs_in); L1/L2/L3 tap-offs 35/50/70 mm² (L3 vd_cumulative binding); L3.C04 long final 4 mm² (vd_cumulative at 4.5% near 5% limit); L3.C07 server rack 6 mm² 3-phase 4W with 30% h3 harmonic derating per Annex E (Ch=0.86) + neutral upsized §523.6.3. 3 calc tools pending.

sections.title: Project Supply + Jurisdiction
sections.summary: INT jurisdiction; IEC 60364 series is the primary code. 1000 kVA TX secondary feeds MSB-1 at 400 V TPN+E TN-S per IEC 60364-4-41:2017 §411. Engineer declares PSCC = 25 kA at TX-1 secondary busbar. IEC 60364-4-43:2017 §433.1 anchors Iz ≥ In; IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex G sets Vd limits; IEC 60364-5-54:2011 §543 anchors CPC sizing.

decisions.label: TN-S earthing per engineer declaration
decisions.summary: 400V TPN+E supply with separate PE conductor; fault-protection by ADS per IEC 60364-4-41:2017 §411.
decisions.rule: Fault protection by ADS per IEC 60364-4-41:2017 §411

decisions.label: PSCC 25 kA declared at TX-1
decisions.summary: Engineer accepts PSCC declaration from TX nameplate + utility impedance; downstream Ifault attenuated by cable impedance per cascade.

sections.title: Cascade Tree + Topology
sections.summary: Seven-node cascade: TX-1 (service_entrance) → MSB-1.F-RISER (feeder) → 3 riser tap-offs L1/L2/L3 (sub_feeder) → 2 representative L3 finals (L3.C04 socket-outlet + L3.C07 IT load). Hierarchical node_ids let downstream consumers (cable-schedule, riser, cable-containment) render the tree without heuristic re-parenting.

decisions.label: Three-tier cascade with riser fan-out
decisions.summary: service_entrance → feeder → 3× sub_feeder (one per floor) → final_circuit; the L3 tap-off carries two representative finals to exercise vd_cumulative + harmonic_derating bindings.
decisions.rule: Cascade topology per cable-sizing IR spec; IEC 60364-3:2008 §314 division of installation

sections.title: Walk-the-Ladder Approach + Binding Constraints
sections.summary: Engine walks the standard IEC ladder until all checks pass simultaneously. TX-1 binds parallel_required (single 630 mm² insufficient for 1600 A In); RISER.L3 + RISER.L3.C04 bind vd_cumulative (5% power limit at the deepest leaf); RISER.L3.C07 binds harmonic_derating (30% h3 → Ch = 0.86). Three other nodes bind iz_vs_in (F-RISER, L1, L2).

decisions.label: parallel_required on TX-1
decisions.summary: 1600 A In exceeds single 630 mm² Cu XLPE method F (Iz ≈ 1090 A); 2 × 500 mm² parallel accepted per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 §523.6 (Iz_corrected ≈ 1830 A).

decisions.label: vd_cumulative on RISER.L3 sub-feeder
decisions.summary: 50 mm² rejected at 1.7% cumulative (leaves only 3.3% for L3.C04); 70 mm² accepted at 1.5% cumulative to preserve 3.5% headroom downstream.
decisions.rule: Cumulative-Vd cascade budget per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex G

decisions.label: vd_cumulative on RISER.L3.C04 final
decisions.summary: 20A single-phase final at 38 m on PVC singles method B1: 2.5 mm² rejected (cumulative 6.6%); 4 mm² accepted at cumulative 4.5%, within the 5% power limit.
decisions.rule: Cumulative Vd ≤ 5% for power circuits per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex G

decisions.label: harmonic_derating on RISER.L3.C07 IT load
decisions.summary: 32A 3-phase 4-wire server rack with 30% h3 content: 4 mm² rejected (Iz with Ch=0.86 gives 30.1 A < 32 A); 6 mm² accepted (Iz 41 A ≥ 32 A). Neutral upsized to full phase per §523.6.3.
decisions.rule: Harmonic derating per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex E Table E.1; neutral upsize per §523.6.3

sections.title: Cumulative Voltage Drop
sections.summary: Vd accumulates root → leaf along the cascade. IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex G limits: lighting 3% / power 5% (≈ 20 V at 400 V L-L). The deepest leaf L3.C04 stacks TX-1 0.3% + F-RISER 0.5% + L3 0.7% + segment 3.0% = 4.5% (within 5%). RISER.L3 walks up to 70 mm² at design time to preserve that 3.0% segment headroom for L3.C04.

decisions.label: Cascade Vd budget allocation
decisions.summary: Walk RISER.L3 sub-feeder up at design time (50 → 70 mm²) so the 38 m L3.C04 final stays within the 5% cumulative limit with the smallest finals csa.
decisions.rule: Vd cumulative accounting per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex G

sections.title: CPC Adiabatic Sizing
sections.summary: Per IEC 60364-5-54:2011 §543: phase ≤ 16 mm² → CPC = phase by Table 54.2 conservative default; for ≥ 25 mm² phase, reduced CPC verified by adiabatic S² ≥ I²t / k² (k = 143 Cu/XLPE; k = 115 Cu/PVC; t = 0.4 s per t_clear_s). CPC selections: TX-1 500/240, F-RISER 185/95, L1 35/16, L2 50/25, L3 70/35, L3.C04 4/2.5, L3.C07 6/6.

decisions.label: Reduced CPC on 500 / 185 / 70 / 50 / 35 mm² phase
decisions.summary: Adiabatic S² ≥ I²t / k² with t = 0.4 s gives S_min well below the simplified Table 54.2 equal-csa figure; engineer adopts reduced CPC per §543.1.2.

sections.title: Motor Starting + Parallel Cables + Harmonic Derating
sections.summary: No motors declared — motor_starting_vd_pct null throughout. parallel_count = 2 at TX-1 (parallel_required binding per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 §523.6); = 1 elsewhere. RISER.L3.C07 carries 30% h3 triplen content → Ch = 0.86 per Annex E; neutral upsized to full phase csa per §523.6.3.

decisions.label: Parallel cables at TX-1
decisions.summary: 2 × 500 mm² Cu XLPE method F parallel run, equal length 8 m, terminated at common MSB-1 busbar; mutual impedance neglected per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 §523.6 second paragraph.

decisions.label: Harmonic derating Ch = 0.86 on L3.C07
decisions.summary: 30% h3 content places the load in the 15-33% band per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex E Table E.1; Ch = 0.86 derates phase ampacity. Neutral upsized to full phase csa because h3 ≥ 15%.
decisions.rule: Harmonic derating per IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex E Table E.1; neutral upsize per §523.6.3

sections.title: Compliance + Assumptions + Tool-Call Pending
sections.summary: compliant = true. Four info-severity flags document binding-constraint walk-ups (TX-1 parallel, L3 vd_cumulative, L3.C04 vd_cumulative at 4.5%, L3.C07 harmonic). Assumptions capture INT supply declaration, cascade Vd budget allocation, harmonic derating basis, CPC adiabatic basis, XLPE-feeders/PVC-finals intent, and WI3 calc deferrals.

decisions.label: Three deferred-calc flags
decisions.summary: calc.cable_ampacity, calc.voltage_drop, calc.cpc_adiabatic carry TOOL-CALL-PENDING flags per WI3 — engineer placeholders ratified at runtime.
decisions.rule: WI3 deferred-calc contract; engineer estimates carry tool_call_pending = true
decisions.code_clause: IEC 60364-5-52:2009 Annex B (ampacity) + Annex G (Vd) + IEC 60364-5-54:2011 §543 (CPC)

sections.title: Cross-Skill Contract
sections.summary: Emits cable-sizing intent with 7 circuit records covering the full hierarchical cascade. Required-field set is the union superset of 4 downstream consumers: cable-schedule (tabulated deliverable), riser (parent-child render), cable-containment (tray / conduit fill), small-power v1.1 (Zs resolution via r1+r2 and reactance per metre at operating temperature).

decisions.label: Forward-compatible intent emission
decisions.summary: Required-field set is the union superset of cable-schedule + riser + cable-containment + small-power v1.1 consumers; optional fields (cable_od_mm, weight_kg_per_m) included for downstream containment fill calc.
